creator: funman@videolan.org
text:
Update multimedia/vlc to 0.8.6i , which adresses usability fixes and fix CVE-2008-2430

Remove unneeded patches from files/ (merged or obsoletes)

Remove dead configuration options (LAME and CORBA)

Fix: Apply attached patch

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Try to install a version of VLC not vulnerable to CVE-2008-2430
